Name: System and Organization Controls 2 (SOC2) - Vercel
Description: SOC 2 Type 2 mapping for Vercel provider checks. Vercel holds SOC 2 Type 2 certification; these mappings assess the customer-side of Vercel's shared responsibility model.

Requirements.Name: CC6.1 Logical and Physical Access Controls
Requirements.Description: The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures over protected information assets to protect them from security events to meet the entity's objectives.

Attributes.Section: CC6.0 - Logical and Physical Access Controls

Requirements.Name: CC6.3 Access Restrictions
Requirements.Description: The entity authorizes, modifies, or removes access to data, software, functions, and other protected information assets based on roles, responsibilities, or the system design and changes, giving consideration to the concepts of least privilege and segregation of duties, to meet the entity's objectives.

Attributes.Section: CC6.0 - Logical and Physical Access Controls

Requirements.Name: CC6.6 Security Measures Against Threats Outside System Boundaries
Requirements.Description: The entity implements logical access security measures to protect against threats from sources outside its system boundaries.

Attributes.Section: CC6.0 - Logical and Physical Access Controls

Requirements.Name: CC7.2 Monitoring of System Components
Requirements.Description: The entity monitors system components and the operation of those components for anomalies that are indicative of malicious acts, natural disasters, and errors affecting the entity's ability to meet its objectives; anomalies are analyzed to determine whether they represent security events.

Requirements.Name: CC8.1 Change Management
Requirements.Description: The entity authorizes, designs, develops or acquires, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure, data, software, and procedures to meet its objectives.

Requirements.Name: CC6.7 Restriction and Management of Transmission, Movement, and Removal of Information
Requirements.Description: The entity restricts the transmission, movement, and removal of information to authorized internal and external users and processes, and protects it during transmission, movement, or removal to meet the entity's objectives.

Attributes.Section: CC6.0 - Logical and Physical Access Controls
